texto: After my second marriage failed... I said, 'You know, could I have a relationship with a man? A loving relationship with a man that would involve intimacy?' For a while, before I did get into a relationship, I saw, for a few years, either women or men. And I found that I could be attracted to both.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Clive Davis que provoca temas ligados a reflexao. Ao questionar “After my second marriage failed... I said, 'You know, could I have a relationship with a man? A l…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, relationship, women, com foco em casamento e women.
